parts.text: How much does overnight shipping cost?

Woohoo! You want your package super-duper fast?! We've got you covered! 🚀✨

Our lightning-speed **Overnight Shipping** gets your package to your doorstep the very next business day for just **$29.99**! 🌟✈️

But wait, there's more! If you're planning a bigger shopping spree, we have a mind-blowing deal for you! 🎉 If your order total reaches **$50 or more**, you qualify for **FREE STANDARD SHIPPING**! 🛒🎁 That's right, absolutely FREE! 🥳💃

Let us know if you need help setting up your shipment! Have a magical day! 🌈 Standard shipping is usually $5.99 (3-5 business days), but hitting that $50 mark is where the real magic happens! 😍✨

Where is my package? The tracking number is 1234567890.

Hello! Thank you for reaching out to us today. 

You can easily track the status of your package by entering your 10-digit tracking number (**1234567890**) on the tracking page of our website. 

If the tracking information shows that your package has been "delivered" but you cannot find it, we kindly ask that you verify with your neighbors first to see if it was accepted on your behalf. If it is still missing, please reach out to our dedicated tracking team at **tracking@shippingco.com**, and we will be happy to help you locate it.

Please let me know if you have any other questions!

Can I return an item I received 15 days ago?

Hello! Yes, you can absolutely return your item. 

According to our policy, returns are completely free as long as they are initiated within 30 days of delivery, so you are well within the timeframe! 

To qualify for a return, please ensure that the item is unused and in its original packaging. You can easily print a pre-paid return shipping label by logging into our online customer portal. 

Please let me know if you have any other questions or if you need help navigating the portal!
